name: Universal Entity Entry Architecture
purpose: Receive humans, households, groups, organizations, governments, products, devices and AI systems through context-appropriate entry routes while preserving dignity, consent, authority and proof.
routingRules: Humans enter through HAPI unless acting solely as an authorized representative of another entity.
Organizations enter through an entity profile with declared mandate, officers, roles and authority boundaries.
Governments use institutional authority, audit and public-duty routes rather than personal-account assumptions.
Children and protected persons require stronger safeguarding and representative controls.
Products, devices and AI agents require accountable human or organizational authority.
An entity may hold several roles and participate in several pathways at once.
Sensitive attributes are private by default and cannot be used for ranking unless necessary, lawful and consented.
Entry may begin in limited mode and expand as identity, authority and proof strengthen.
